creator: brueffer@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Feb 29, 2008 at 04:52:07PM +0900, n-kogane@syd.odn.ne.jp wrote:
> >Description:
> 	In 7.0-RELEASE manpages, there are big difference between 7.0-RC3
> 	and 7.0-RELEASE.
> 	It is also big different from manpages made with "make release". 
> 	What happen?

Between RC3 und RELEASE, only one manpage patch went in.  What kind of
differences do you see?

- Christian
